findings.description: Repeated page header/footer content in HTML
findings.evidence: The following text blocks repeat 3+ times, likely page headers/footers that should not appear in the body: 'where,' (3x); 'geosyntec consultantsgeosyntec consultants of nc, p.c. nc license no.: c 3500 an...' (3x); 'raleighaugust 2020' (3x).

findings.description: Figure 1 (Outfall 002 Sampling Locations aerial satellite map) is severely degraded in the HTML. The full-page aerial photograph showing the facility layout, sampling locations, and detailed inset is reduced to a very small thumbnail showing only a partial crop of the map area.
findings.evidence: PDF Page 15 shows a large, detailed aerial satellite image of the Chemours Fayetteville Works facility with clearly marked sampling locations, a zoomed inset of the Outfall 002 area, scale bars, and legend. The HTML renders only a small cropped thumbnail of the River Water Intake area, with remaining figure elements extracted as disconnected text labels.

findings.description: Figure 2 flowchart content is duplicated: the flowchart image is rendered alongside a plain-text extraction of all the decision-box and action-box text from the same flowchart, creating redundant content that disrupts reading flow.
findings.evidence: PDF Page 16 shows only the flowchart image. The HTML shows the flowchart image followed by text such as 'Was a 24-hr composite sample collected?', 'YES', 'Use 24-hr composite sample concentration*', 'NO', 'Use 60-day rolling average dry concentration', etc. — all duplicating content already visible in the image.

findings.description: Figure 3 flowchart content is duplicated: the flowchart image is rendered alongside a plain-text extraction of the decision-box and action-box text from the same flowchart.
findings.evidence: PDF Page 17 shows only the Figure 3 flowchart image. The HTML shows the flowchart image followed by text such as 'Was a 24-hr composite sample collected?', 'YES', 'Use 24-hr composite sample concentration*', 'NO', 'Use 60-day rolling average dry concentration', '*For the 24-hr time period', duplicating content already in the image.

findings.description: Figure 1 main satellite/aerial map image showing Outfall 002 sampling locations is missing from the HTML. Only two small decorative fragments (a north arrow at 9.1pt wide and a callout image at 89.8pt wide) are present instead of the full map.
findings.evidence: PDF page 15 shows a full satellite photo with facility overview (0–1000 ft scale), a zoomed inset of the outfall area (0–50 ft scale), and labeled sampling locations. The HTML has only and — no img tag for the primary aerial photograph.

findings.description: Figure 3 flowchart diagram image is entirely missing from the HTML. The flowchart content is rendered only as unstructured text paragraphs, losing the visual decision-tree structure.
findings.evidence:
PDF page 17 shows a flowchart diagram with decision diamond and result boxes for determining concentration at the River Water Intake. The HTML has no tag for this figure; instead it renders the box text as flat paragraphs: '

Was a 24-hr composite sample collected?

YES

Use 24-hr composite sample concentration*

NO

Use 60-day rolling average dry concentration

'.

findings.description: Alt text 'Map features layer callout image' is generic and non-descriptive; it does not convey what the image depicts.
findings.evidence: HTML: . This fragment appears to be the inset showing the Outfall 002 sampling area but the alt text does not describe the sampling locations or facility context shown.
